title: Checkpointable Annotation
description: The Checkpointable annotation is used to indicate that a task can be safely checkpointed and restarted in case of failures or preemptions. It is used to decorate a class, indicating that the task can be checkpointed and restarted, which allows for fault tolerance and efficient processing of large datasets.

raw_response:
TITLE: Checkpointable Annotation

DESCRIPTION:
The Checkpointable annotation is used to indicate that a task can be safely checkpointed and restarted in case of failures or preemptions. It is used to decorate a class, indicating that the task can be checkpointed and restarted, which allows for fault tolerance and efficient processing of large datasets.
